name: Darklord Gulgolet
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>堕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>グルガルタ
desc: You can only Special Summon "Darklord Gulgolet(s)" once per turn. If this card is Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 2 "Darklord Tokens" (Fairy/DARK/Level 6/ATK 0/DEF 0), also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Fairy monsters. If this card is sent to the GY: You can add 1 "Darklord" card, except "Darklord Gulgolet", or 1 "Forbidden" Quick-Play Spell, from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Darklord Gulgolet" once per turn.

You can only use this effect of "Darklord Gulgolet" once per turn.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
